root.rep_text: -> รายงานเคลื่อนไหวหุ้น

membership_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

root.sql: select sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.doc_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type_description, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.period, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_amount, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock, -- sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.cancel_status, (case sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.cancel_status when '0' then 'ปกติ' when '1' then 'ยกเลิก' end) as cancel_status, sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.sign_flag, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock as sharestock from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail, sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem where ( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type) and ( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no /*and ( ( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = '038318' ) )*/ /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no
